units.title: My Body - Part 2
units.subtitle: Arms, Legs, Hands, Feet and Actions

lessons.title: Move Your Body
lessons.topic: Main limbs and the grammar of commands

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What body part do you clap with in the song?
questions.hint: You can wear rings on them.

questions.question_text: Which part of your body do you use to nod yes?
What do you use to kick a ball?
questions.hint: You kick a soccer ball with it.

items.definition: At the end of your arm

steps.title: Ella's Fun Day
steps.text: Hi! I am Ella. I have two strong legs. I can stomp my feet. Clap your hands with me. Let's play!

questions.question: How many legs does Ella have?

steps.explanation: Use 'Clap your' to ask for clapping.

steps.audio_text: Hello everyone! Let's move our bodies. First, touch your legs and then wave your hand. Can you try that?

questions.question: What do you do after touching your legs?

steps.prompt: Action: Can you say 'Touch your arm'?

questions.question_text: Touch your ___. (Grammar question)
Which one is a 'leg'? (Vocabulary question)
What do you wave to say hello? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: A 'hand' and a 'foot' are the same.

lessons.title: Ten Fingers
lessons.topic: Small body parts and plural review

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to write and draw?
Which part helps you see the rainbow?
What part do you wave with to say hello?
questions.hint: You raise it when you want to greet someone.

items.example: Touch your finger to your nose.
I have a long jump rope.

items.definition: Not big from end to end

steps.title: Wiggle and Clap!
steps.text: Wiggle your fingers! I have ten fingers. Clap your hands! I have ten toes. My toes are short. Touch your toes and smile.

questions.question: How many fingers do they have?
What should you do after touching your toes?

steps.explanation: We say "are" for more than one.

steps.audio_text: Let's touch our nose and wiggle our long fingers. Can you count all your toes?

questions.question_text: Fingers are ___. (Grammar question)
Which word means a 'small part on your foot'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Toes are short.'
Read: 'My toes are __ and ____.' What are the words?
Fill in the blank: 'I can count my ___. (Comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to wave hello?
questions.hint: You use them to clap too!

questions.question_text: Which body part lets you turn your head left and right?
questions.hint: It's between your head and shoulders!

questions.question_text: What part of your body bends when you sit down?
questions.hint: They help you bend your legs!

steps.title: Dance with Me!
steps.text: Clap your hands and say, 'I have two hands!' Stomp your feet and shout, 'I have two feet!' Touch your knees and shoulders. Great job, everyone!

questions.question: What do you do with your feet?
How many hands do you have?

steps.audio_text: Hi kids! Touch your shoulder and say, 'I have knees!' Now, stomp your feet twice!

questions.question: What do you touch and say?
questions.answer: Touch your shoulder and say 'I have knees!'
options: Touch your shoulder and say 'I have knees!'
Touch your knee and say 'I have shoulders!'
Touch your toes and say 'I have feet!'

questions.question: How many times do you stomp your feet?

questions.question_text: What does 'stomp your feet' mean? (Vocabulary question)
Fill in the blank: Clap your ___! (Grammar question)
True or False: You can touch your knee with your hand.
Which body part helps you shrug? (Reading comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What body part helps you clap your hands?
questions.hint: These are at the end of your arms.

questions.question_text: Which body part do you use to hear a song?
questions.hint: These are on the side of your head.

questions.question_text: What body part do you use to taste ice cream?

steps.title: Super Day with My Body
steps.text: I have two eyes and a nose. I can see the sky. Touch your nose! I have ten toes. I can stomp my feet. My hands can clap. Touch your shoulders!

questions.question: How many toes does the character have?
What can the character do with hands?

steps.audio_text: Hi there! I have a big red ball and I like to bounce it every day. Watch me clap my hands and stomp my feet!

questions.question: What does he like to do with the ball?

steps.prompt: Say: 'I have two feet and two legs.'
steps.expected_text: i have two feet and two legs

questions.question_text: I ___ a shiny jacket. (Grammar question)
Which picture shows 'clap'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Touch your head' means use your hands to touch.
What did we use to stomp in the lesson?
